channel.title: Services on Freedoms4
channel.description: Recent content in Services on Freedoms4

item.title: File share
item.author: your-email@example.com (Freedoms4)
item.description: Visit share.freedoms4.org to quickly upload files and get sharable links.

item.title: XMPP Account
item.author: your-email@example.com (Freedoms4)
item.description: Send your desired username to hyzen@freedoms4.org via Email (or via XMPP if already have an XMPP account). Account creation can take upto 24 hours.
